title: 标准 MHA 的 NPU 内核与状态机：AscendAttentionBackendImpl
summary: 25/25 测试全过；lint_fidelity 无 BLOCKING。精简版与真仓 vllm_ascend/attention/{attention_v1,utils,attention_mask}.py + device/device_op.py 逐符号比对，控制流一致（subtract-only，仅删 delete 批准项、must_keep 全在场）。验证的是与真仓控制流一致而非自洽：五态机分流 / split_decodes_and_prefills 四元组拆批 / build 装配 slot_mapping·block_table·seq_lens / forward_impl 按状态选 paged vs fused / sparse_mode 0·4·3 三选一 / reshape_and_cache→_npu_reshape_and_cache 写 KV / get_impl_cls 按 enable_cp 收口 f7 / workspace 预取节拍。

run.environment: host (无容器)；host 无 NPU/CANN，torch_npu 由 conftest.py 的 NpuRecorder 记录替身桩入，真实算子不真算——只验可读控制流的分流/入参

fidelity_lint.result: 保真度检查全部通过（无 BLOCKING）

behavior_cross_checks: AscendAttentionState 五态值 0-4 与成员顺序 — 对照 attention_v1.py:L143-L148 一致

split_decodes_and_prefills 返回 (num_decodes,num_prefills,num_decode_tokens,num_prefill_tokens)：max_query_len<=threshold→全 decode；否则 first_prefill=argmax，num_decode_tokens=query_start_loc[first_prefill] — 对照 utils.py:L273-L315 一致

build：slot_mapping[:num_actual_tokens]、block_table_tensor 透传、seq_lens_list=seq_lens.tolist()、actual_seq_lengths_q=query_start_loc_cpu[1:].tolist()、attn_mask 来自 singleton(2048x2048 splitfuse) — 对照 attention_v1.py:L272-L332 + attention_mask.py:L53-L79 一致
build_for_graph_capture：仅 DecodeOnly/ChunkedPrefill/SpecDecoding 放行，其余 raise NotImplementedError，末尾覆写 attn_state — 对照 attention_v1.py:L334-L354 一致
get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls：enable_cp() 假→Ascend(Backend)Impl/Builder，真→CP 版（f7 收口）— 对照 attention_v1.py:L84-L98 + utils.py:L58-L61 一致
reshape_and_cache → DeviceOperator.reshape_and_cache → torch_npu._npu_reshape_and_cache(slot_indices=slot_mapping[:num_actual_tokens]) — 对照 attention_v1.py:L1229-L1256 + device_op.py:L42-L47 一致

forward_impl：仅 DecodeOnly && using_paged_attention && sliding_window is None → forward_paged_attention(_npu_paged_attention)，否则 forward_fused_infer_attention；门槛未命中(cudagraph!=FULL_DECODE_ONLY)的 decode 回落 fused — 对照 attention_v1.py:L1258-L1277 一致
forward_fused_infer_attention 非 sinks 三选一 sparse_mode：非因果=0 / 滑窗=4(pre_tokens=window) / 因果=3 — 对照 attention_v1.py:L1112-L1160（else 分支）一致
using_paged_attention 门槛：spec_config / A5 / cudagraph!=FULL_DECODE_ONLY / shape 不在 pa_shape_list 任一不满足即 False — 对照 utils.py:L44-L55 一致
workspace 预取节拍：图捕获下 full_graph_pa 先 _npu_paged_attention_get_workspace 量出并缓存 graph_params.workspaces[num_tokens] — 对照 attention_v1.py:L922-L945 一致
must_keep_check: AscendAttentionState(5 成员)/AscendMetadata/get_impl_cls/get_builder_cls/get_kv_cache_shape/enable_cp/build/build_for_graph_capture/split_decodes_and_prefills/slot_mapping/block_tables/forward/forward_impl/reshape_and_cache/forward_paged/forward_fused/_get_fia_params/using_paged_attention/DeviceOperator/AscendC8AttentionBackendImpl(SUBTRACTED 点名) — 全部在场（lint_fidelity 校验通过）
